commands.review_summary:
The PR adds provider-level cooldown tracking for inline `models.providers.<id>.apiKey` credentials, gates cooled inline keys during auth resolution and availability checks, marks no-profile runner failures, and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +226, Tests +258. Total +484 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows `markInlineProviderApiKeyFailure` writes `inline-api-key:<provider>` into `usageStats`, then `saveAuthProfileStore` prunes `usageStats` to real profile IDs before persisting/cache update; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to fix the persistence blocker and add after-fix real behavior proof for the final current-head path; automation cannot supply that contributor proof for them.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
